info.title: ActivityInfo API
info.description: REST API for ActivityInfo. Authenticate with a Personal API Token either as `Authorization: Bearer <TOKEN>` or HTTP Basic Auth (any username, token as password).

post.description: Updates the authenticated user's name and/or locale. Returns the updated AccountStatus plus a locale cookie.

get.description: Returns user profile, billing account, and subscription status for the authenticated user.
Lists all active Personal API tokens for the authenticated user (up to 10).

post.description: Creates a new Personal API token. Returns an error if the user already has 10 tokens. Scope `LOGIN` is not allowed.

delete.description: Permanently revokes the specified API token.

get.description: Lists users across all databases on the billing account. Optionally filter by `databaseId`.

parameters.name: databaseId
parameters.description: Optionally filter to users of a specific database

post.description: Admin-only. Assigns email domains to a billing account.

get.description: Returns all databases owned by or shared with the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a new database, optionally from a template (`reporting`, `casemanagement`).

get.description: Returns the full database tree including resources, roles, and grants.

post.description: Updates database resources, roles, or supported languages.

delete.description: Permanently deletes the database and all its data.

post.description: Attempts to recover a recently deleted database.
Reverts the database schema to a previous version.

get.description: Returns the translation dictionary for a database resource. `dictionaryId` is `database` for the whole database or `form/{formId}` for a single form.

post.description: Adds a new form to the database.
Invites a user to the database and assigns a role.
Validates an email before adding a user. Returns whether the email is valid.

delete.description: Removes a user from the database. If `userId` matches the authenticated user, this leaves the database instead.

get.description: Returns all records as a JSON array of field-value objects.
Returns the full edit history of a record.

post.description: Creates, updates, or deletes records across one or more forms in a single transaction.
Executes a QueryModel and returns results in columnar format.
Executes a QueryModel and returns results as an array of row objects.

get.description: Returns all rows of a form using the v43 engine. Pass `_truncate=false` to disable string truncation.

parameters.name: _truncate
parameters.description: Set to `false` to disable string truncation

post.description: Starts an asynchronous background job. Poll `GET /jobs/{jobId}` for status.

get.description: Returns the current status and progress of a job.
Downloads the output file produced by a completed job.

parameters.name: exportId
parameters.description: Export ID from the completed JobStatus

get.description: Returns all reports owned by or shared with the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a new report or updates an existing one via the `UpdateReportRequest` body.

get.description: Returns the result rows of a single-pivot or single-table report as JSON.
Health-check. Returns 200 when the server is reachable and the token is valid.
Full-text search across databases, forms, and records.

AddDatabaseDTO.title: AddDatabaseDTO
AddDatabaseDTO.description: Payload for creating a new database.

fields.description: Field values keyed by field ID

QueryColumnsResult.title: QueryColumnsResult
QueryColumnsResult.description: Columnar result: each key is a column ID mapping to an array of values.

type.description: Job type key (camelCase as in the server source)

locale.description: Optional BCP-47 locale for the job output

AuthenticationScope.description: Scope of an API token. `LOGIN` cannot be used when generating tokens via the API.

token.description: The raw token value (only shown once)

templateId.description: Optional template. Empty string = blank database.

fields.description: Field values keyed by field ID

changes.description: List of record mutations to apply in a single transaction

fields.description: Field values to set, keyed by field ID

rootFormId.description: CUID of the root form to query

BearerAuth.description: Personal API Token from ActivityInfo user settings. Set the `ACTIVITYINFO_API_TOKEN` environment variable in your HTTP client.

BasicAuth.description: Use any username and your API token as the password.

tags.name: Accounts
tags.description: User profile and API token management
